title: Playmaker Character
description: A Playmaker character = a named AI partner with a persona, knowledge pack, backend routing, and optional voice. Extends the soma-assistant manifest model: persona + knowledgeDoc + voice_id map directly onto manifest.persona fields.

characterId.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Used as the selector key and in session attribution.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the character selector and message labels.

avatar.description: Single emoji or short string used as the character's visual avatar.

backend.description: Routing backend. soma-infer: POST to VPS /infer/chat with persona+knowledge. ui-bridge: relay through Yeshie hardened relay (F4, built by W2). Additional backends (e.g. api-direct) may be added in Wave 2.

backendConfig.description: Backend-specific config. For soma-infer: { inferUrl, assistantId }. For ui-bridge: { relayTarget } (W2 fills this).

voiceAgentId.description: ElevenLabs conversational agent ID for voice replies. null = pending (voice-clone workflow F2 fills this). When null, falls back to text-only TTS via voice_id or silent.

persona.description: Persona definition. Maps onto soma-assistant manifest.persona fields.

name.description: Character name used in the system prompt and message attribution.

voice_id.description: ElevenLabs voice ID for TTS narration (non-agent path). null = no TTS or use voiceAgentId path.

greeting.description: Opening message shown when the character is first addressed.

personaDoc.description: Path to persona.md relative to this package's characters/ dir. Resolved server-side by soma-infer.

knowledgeDoc.description: Path to knowledge.md relative to this package's characters/ dir. Resolved server-side by soma-infer.

systemPromptSummary.description: One-paragraph summary used as a fallback system prompt when personaDoc is not available server-side.

capabilities.description: Capability set for this character. Subset of soma-assistant capability enum, plus playmaker-specific additions (margins-reactor for F7).

notes.description: Human-readable notes for developers — integration status, TODOs, known limits.
